##NAMES=Boltwoodite
##RRUFFID=R060753
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(K,Na)(UO_2_)(SiO_3_OH)·1.5H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Rossing mine, between Rossing & Arandis, near Swakopmund, Namibia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Radiating tufts of pale yellow-orange bladed crystals
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060753
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 7.058 b: 7.045 c: 6.629 alpha: 90 beta: 105.38 gamma: 90 volume: 317.8 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=785
